```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/soundfont.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
  <style>
/* ── drummachine.css ── */
#drumset-root {
  --label-font-size: 1rem;
  --title-font-size: 1.5rem;
  --dial-size: 50px;
  --dial-border: 2px;
  --dial-color: #333;
  --dial-bg: transparent;
  --dial-active-bg: #333;
  --dial-active-color: #fff;
}

.sequencer {
  background: #fff;
  color: #000;
  padding: 20px;
  min-width: 500px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.sequencer-container {
  min-width: 500px;
}

.row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

#exportArea .row {
  margin: 0;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  --bs-gutter-x: 0;
  --bs-gutter-y: 0;
}

#exportArea .row > .label,
#exportArea .row > .step {
  width: auto;
  max-width: none;
  flex-shrink: 1;
  margin-top: 0;
  padding-left: 0;
  padding-right: 0;
}

.step-labels { order: 1; }
.instrument-row { order: 0; align-items: center; }

.label,
.step {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: 1px solid #000;
  background: #fff;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 5px 0;
}

.step-labels .label {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid #000;
  font-size: var(--label-font-size);
}

.step {
  cursor: pointer;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.step img {
  max-height: 100%;
  width: auto;
}

.current-step {
  background: #ddd;
  transition: background 0.1s;
}

#gridTitleDisplay {
  font-size: var(--title-font-size);
  text-align: center;
  margin: 1em 0;
}

fieldset {
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  padding: 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

legend {
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0 6px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.dial-option {
  width: var(--dial-size);
  height: var(--dial-size);
  border: var(--dial-border) solid var(--dial-color);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--dial-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--dial-color);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.5rem;
  user-select: none;
}

.dial-option.selected {
  background: var(--dial-active-bg);
  color: var(--dial-active-color);
}

.dial-option.disabled {
  opacity: 0.3;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

#subdivisionDial,
#tempoDial {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 0.75em auto;
}

.centered-container {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  height: 100px;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.inline-controls {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

#exportArea {
  transform-origin: top left;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

#exportArea .overflow-auto {
  width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  overflow-y: visible;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

.sequencer-scale-stage {
  display: inline-block;
}

.diagram-size-controls {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.diagram-size-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diagram-size-header label {
  margin: 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#instrumentsMenu {
  margin: 1em 0;
}

.instrument-group {
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}

.instrument-group h4 {
  margin: 0.5em 0;
}

.instrument-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 3px;
  width: 52px;
  margin: 0.2em;
  padding: 5px 4px 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 7px;
  border: 2px solid #ccc;
  opacity: 0.4;
  transition: opacity 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
  text-align: center;
  color: #333;
  user-select: none;
}
.instrument-chip svg { display: block; }
.instrument-chip.active {
  opacity: 1;
  border-color: #555;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
}
/* legacy img rule kept so export clone img styles don't break */
.instrument-options img.active {
  opacity: 1;
}

.sequencer-container {
  transform-origin: top left;
}

/* ── accent theme ── */
#drumset-root {
  --accent-pink:      #e88697;
  --accent-turquoise: #00b4ce;
}#drumset-root {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}

.btn-success {
  background-color: var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  border-color:     var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.btn-success:hover { background-color: #00a4bc !important; }

.btn-secondary {
  background-color: var(--accent-pink) !important;
  border-color:     var(--accent-pink) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}
.btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #d37686 !important; }

.btn-outline-primary {
  color: var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  border-color: var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
}
.btn-outline-primary:hover {
  background-color: var(--accent-turquoise) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
}

/* Collapsible sections */
.ds-collapsible {
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #fff;
}
.ds-collapsible-summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #555;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  user-select: none;
}
.ds-collapsible-summary::before {
  content: '▶';
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  transition: transform 0.15s;
  display: inline-block;
}
details[open] > .ds-collapsible-summary::before { transform: rotate(90deg); }
.ds-collapsible-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.ds-collapsible-body {
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  .ds-collapsible { background: #2a2a2a; border-color: #444; }
  .ds-collapsible-body { border-top-color: #444; }
  .ds-collapsible-summary { color: #aaa; }
}

/* Row icon column (left of each instrument row) */
.row-icon {
  width: 40px;
  min-width: 40px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #555;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
}
.step-label-spacer {
  width: 40px;
  min-width: 40px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
/* Instrument step icons */
.step-icon {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  pointer-events: none;
}
  </style>

<div id="drumset-root">
  <div class="container py-4">
    <h1 class="mb-3">Modern Band Drum Machine V2</h1>
    <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
      See how these patterns fit into a full band texture:
      <a href="/tools/accomp-styles.html#as-percussion">Drum &amp; Hand Percussion patterns →</a>
    </p>

    <!-- Always-visible: Playback + Pattern Loaders -->
    <div class="row g-3 mb-2">
      <div class="col-lg-5">
        <fieldset>
          <legend>Playback</legend>
          <div class="inline-controls mb-2">
            <button id="playBtn" class="btn btn-success">&#9654; Play</button>
            <button id="stopBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">&#9632; Stop</button>
            <label for="tempo" class="mb-0">BPM:</label>
            <input type="number" id="tempo" min="20" max="300" value="120"
                   class="form-control form-control-sm" style="width:75px">
          </div>
          <div class="text-center" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#666;margin-bottom:4px">Tempo note value</div>
          <div id="tempoDial">
            <div class="dial-option selected" id="tempo-quarter" data-value="1" title="Quarter note = BPM">&#9834;</div>
            <div class="dial-option" id="tempo-eighth" data-value="0.5" title="Eighth note = BPM">&#9833;</div>
            <div class="dial-option" id="tempo-dotted" data-value="1.5" title="Dotted quarter = BPM">&#9834;.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-1">
            <div class="form-check form-check-inline mb-0">
              <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="metronomeToggle">
              <label class="form-check-label" for="metronomeToggle">Metronome</label>
            </div>
            <div class="form-check form-check-inline mb-0">
              <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="metronomePulseToggle">
              <label class="form-check-label" for="metronomePulseToggle">Eighth pulse</label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="swingRange" style="white-space:nowrap">Swing: <span id="swingValue">off</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="swingRange" min="0" max="25" step="1" value="0"
                   class="form-range" style="width:100px">
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="rideSelect" style="white-space:nowrap">Ride:</label>
            <select id="rideSelect" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
              <option value="medium20">20&Prime; Medium</option>
              <option value="jazz18">18&Prime; Jazz (dark)</option>
              <option value="rock22">22&Prime; Rock</option>
              <option value="flat">Flat ride</option>
              <option value="bell">Bell</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="techniqueSelect" style="white-space:nowrap">Technique:</label>
            <select id="techniqueSelect" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
              <option value="stick">Stick</option>
              <option value="mallet">Mallet</option>
              <option value="brush">Brush</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="rideDecayRange" style="white-space:nowrap">Decay: <span id="rideDecayValue">2.2</span>s</label>
            <input type="range" id="rideDecayRange" min="0.1" max="4.5" step="0.1" value="2.2"
                   class="form-range" style="width:100px">
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="reverbRange" style="white-space:nowrap">Ride reverb: <span id="reverbValue">0</span>%</label>
            <input type="range" id="reverbRange" min="0" max="100" step="5" value="0"
                   class="form-range" style="width:100px">
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="rideHpRange" style="white-space:nowrap">Ride HP: <span id="rideHpValue">20</span> Hz</label>
            <input type="range" id="rideHpRange" min="20" max="6000" step="20" value="20"
                   class="form-range" style="width:100px">
          </div>
          <div class="inline-controls mt-2">
            <label class="mb-0" for="rideLpRange" style="white-space:nowrap">Ride LP: <span id="rideLpValue">20k</span> Hz</label>
            <input type="range" id="rideLpRange" min="400" max="20000" step="100" value="20000"
                   class="form-range" style="width:100px">
          </div>
        </fieldset>
      </div>
      <div class="col-lg-7">
        <fieldset>
          <legend>Load Pattern</legend>
          <div class="inline-controls mb-2">
            <label class="mb-0" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#555;white-space:nowrap">Meter:</label>
            <select id="meterFilter" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
              <option value="">All</option>
              <option value="duple">Duple (2/4, 4/4)</option>
              <option value="triple">Triple (3/4)</option>
              <option value="compound">Compound (6/8)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label mb-1" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#555">Drum set</label>
            <select id="loadPatternSelect" class="form-select form-select-sm">
              <option value="">— choose a preset —</option>
              <optgroup label="Pop / Rock">
                <option value="backbeat"   data-mt="duple" data-ol="Backbeat">Backbeat</option>
                <option value="driving8"   data-mt="duple" data-ol="Driving 8ths">Driving 8ths</option>
                <option value="ska"        data-mt="duple" data-ol="Ska / reggae (one-drop)">Ska / reggae (one-drop)</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Jazz / Swing">
                <option value="swing_ride"      data-mt="duple"  data-ol="Swing — ride cymbal">Swing — ride cymbal</option>
                <option value="swing_hats"      data-mt="duple"  data-ol="Swing — closed hi-hat">Swing — closed hi-hat</option>
                <option value="swing_hats_open" data-mt="duple"  data-ol="Swing — open hi-hat">Swing — open hi-hat</option>
                <option value="swing_brushes"   data-mt="duple"  data-ol="Swing — brushes">Swing — brushes</option>
                <option value="jazzwaltz_ride"  data-mt="triple" data-ol="Jazz waltz — ride">Jazz waltz — ride</option>
                <option value="jazzwaltz_hats"  data-mt="triple" data-ol="Jazz waltz — hats">Jazz waltz — hats</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Latin">
                <option value="bossa"    data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Bossa nova">Bossa nova</option>
                <option value="tango"    data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Tango (habanera)">Tango (habanera)</option>
                <option value="montuno"  data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Son montuno (clave)">Son montuno (clave)</option>
                <option value="samba"    data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Samba">Samba</option>
                <option value="mambo"    data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Mambo">Mambo</option>
                <option value="calypso"  data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Calypso / mento">Calypso / mento</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Funk &amp; R&amp;B">
                <option value="funk"       data-mt="duple" data-ol="Funk">Funk</option>
                <option value="halftime"   data-mt="duple" data-ol="Half-time feel">Half-time feel</option>
                <option value="secondline" data-mt="duple" data-ol="New Orleans second line">New Orleans second line</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Other">
                <option value="waltz"     data-mt="triple"   data-ol="Waltz">Waltz</option>
                <option value="compound6" data-mt="compound" data-ol="Compound (6/8)">Compound (6/8)</option>
              </optgroup>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="mb-2">
            <label class="form-label mb-1" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#555">Hand percussion</label>
            <select id="loadHandPatternSelect" class="form-select form-select-sm">
              <option value="">— choose a preset —</option>
              <optgroup label="Bongo">
                <option value="bongo_martillo"     data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Bongo — martillo">Bongo — martillo</option>
                <option value="bongo_slow"         data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Bongo — quarters">Bongo — quarters</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Conga">
                <option value="conga_tumbao"       data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Conga — tumbao">Conga — tumbao</option>
                <option value="conga_tumbao_dense" data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Conga — tumbao (dense)">Conga — tumbao (dense)</option>
                <option value="conga_son"          data-mt="duple"    data-ol="Conga — son">Conga — son</option>
                <option value="conga_waltz"        data-mt="triple"   data-ol="Conga — waltz">Conga — waltz</option>
                <option value="conga_6_8"          data-mt="compound" data-ol="Conga — 6/8">Conga — 6/8</option>
              </optgroup>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label class="form-label mb-1" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#555">Fill</label>
            <select id="loadFillSelect" class="form-select form-select-sm" disabled>
              <option value="">— fill library coming soon —</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </fieldset>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Collapsible: Grid Settings + Display options -->
    <details class="ds-collapsible mb-2">
      <summary class="ds-collapsible-summary">Settings</summary>
      <div class="ds-collapsible-body">
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-lg-6">
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Grid Settings</legend>
              <div class="inline-controls mb-2">
                <label for="numerator" class="mb-0">Beats:</label>
                <input type="number" id="numerator" min="1" max="16" value="4"
                       class="form-control form-control-sm" style="width:65px">
                <label for="bottomNote" class="mb-0">Note value:</label>
                <select id="bottomNote" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
                  <option value="4">4</option>
                  <option value="8">8</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="text-center" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#666;margin-bottom:4px">Subdivision</div>
              <div id="subdivisionDial">
                <div class="dial-option" id="dial-option-quarter" title="Quarter notes">&#9834;</div>
                <div class="dial-option selected" id="dial-option-eighth" title="Eighth notes">&#9833;</div>
                <div class="dial-option" id="dial-option-sixteenth" title="Sixteenth notes">&#119137;</div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
          </div>
          <div class="col-lg-6">
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Rhythm Labels</legend>
              <!-- Syllable style: hidden, driven from tune page via localStorage -->
              <div class="inline-controls mb-2" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
                <label for="labelStyle" class="mb-0">Style:</label>
                <select id="labelStyle" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
                  <option value="Standard">Standard</option>
                  <option value="Eastman">Eastman</option>
                  <option value="Gordon">Gordon</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="inline-controls mb-2">
                <div class="form-check form-check-inline mb-0">
                  <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="symbolToggle">
                  <label class="form-check-label" for="symbolToggle">Use &amp; for +</label>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="mb-2">
                <button id="customizeLabelsBtn" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Customize Labels</button>
              </div>
              <div class="inline-controls">
                <label for="labelSizeRange" class="mb-0 text-nowrap">Label size: <span id="labelSizeValue">1</span>rem</label>
                <input type="range" id="labelSizeRange" min="0.5" max="2" step="0.1" value="1" class="form-range">
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Title</legend>
              <div class="mb-2">
                <input type="text" id="gridTitleInput" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                       placeholder="Drum sequence title...">
              </div>
              <div class="inline-controls">
                <label for="titleSizeRange" class="mb-0 text-nowrap">Title size:</label>
                <input type="range" id="titleSizeRange" min="0.8" max="4" step="0.1" value="1.5" class="form-range">
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset class="diagram-size-controls">
              <legend>Diagram Size</legend>
              <div class="diagram-size-header">
                <label for="sizeRange" class="mb-0">Scale: <strong><span id="sizeValue">1</span></strong></label>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="sizeRange" min="0.5" max="6" step="0.05" value="1" class="form-range">
            </fieldset>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <!-- Export controls -->
    <div class="mb-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
      <div class="inline-controls">
        <label for="exportResolution" class="mb-0">Export resolution:</label>
        <select id="exportResolution" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width:auto">
          <option value="1">Small (1×)</option>
          <option value="2" selected>Medium (2×)</option>
          <option value="3">Large (3×)</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <button id="exportBtn" class="btn btn-success">Export PNG</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Diagram output -->
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body p-2" id="exportArea">
        <div id="gridTitleDisplay"></div>
        <div class="overflow-auto">
          <div class="sequencer-scale-stage">
            <div class="sequencer sequencer-container"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Collapsible: Instrument Selection -->
    <details class="ds-collapsible mb-3" id="instrumentsMenu">
      <summary class="ds-collapsible-summary">Instrument Selection</summary>
      <div class="ds-collapsible-body">
        <div class="instrument-group" data-row="top">
          <h5>Top Row <small class="text-muted">(cymbals)</small></h5>
          <div class="instrument-options"></div>
        </div>
        <hr>
        <div class="instrument-group" data-row="middle">
          <h5>Middle Row <small class="text-muted">(snare / toms)</small></h5>
          <div class="instrument-options"></div>
        </div>
        <hr>
        <div class="instrument-group" data-row="bottom">
          <h5>Bottom Row <small class="text-muted">(kick / foot)</small></h5>
          <div class="instrument-options"></div>
        </div>
        <hr>
        <div class="instrument-group" data-row="hand">
          <h5>Hand Row <small class="text-muted">(bongo / conga)</small></h5>
          <div class="instrument-options"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </div>

  <script>
// ── drummachine.js ──

// 1) Audio — ABCJS soundfont for all drums except ride; Web Audio synthesis for ride.

// ABCJS soundfont (GM percussion bank)
let SF = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/paulrosen/midi-js-soundfonts/MusyngKite/';
getSoundfontUrl().then(function(url) { SF = url; });
const DRUM_MIDI = {
  hihat: 42, hihatopen: 46, crash: 49, snare: 38,
  hitom: 50, lowtom: 45, floortom: 43,
  rim: 37, rimshot: 40, flam: 38, kick: 36, hatfoot: 44,
  hibongo: 60, lobongo: 61, congamuted: 62, congaslap: 63, congaopen: 64,
  metronome: 76,
};
let sfLoadPromise = null;
let sfReady = false;
function prewarmSoundfont() {
  if (sfLoadPromise) return sfLoadPromise;
  sfLoadPromise = window.ABCJS
    ? ABCJS.synth.playEvent(
        [{ pitch: 36, instrument: 128, duration: 0.001, volume: 0, cents: 0 }],
        null, 1000, SF
      ).then(() => { sfReady = true; })
       .catch(() => { sfLoadPromise = null; })
    : Promise.resolve();
  return sfLoadPromise;
}

// Web Audio — ride cymbal only (synthesis + HP/LP filters + reverb)
let audioCtx   = null;
let masterDry  = null;
let reverbSend = null;
let rideIn     = null;   // ride hits connect here → HPF → LPF → dry + reverb
let rideHPF    = null;
let rideLPF    = null;
let noiseBuffer = null;
let currentRideVariant = 'medium20';

function initAudio() {
  if (audioCtx) {
    if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') audioCtx.resume();
    return;
  }
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();

  noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, audioCtx.sampleRate, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const nd = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < nd.length; i++) nd[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;

  masterDry = audioCtx.createGain();
  masterDry.gain.value = 1.0;
  masterDry.connect(audioCtx.destination);

  const conv = audioCtx.createConvolver();
  const sr = audioCtx.sampleRate;
  const irLen = Math.round(sr * 1.6);
  const ir = audioCtx.createBuffer(2, irLen, sr);
  for (let c = 0; c < 2; c++) {
    const d = ir.getChannelData(c);
    for (let i = 0; i < irLen; i++) d[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - i / irLen, 3);
  }
  conv.buffer = ir;
  const wetGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  wetGain.gain.value = 0.85;
  reverbSend = audioCtx.createGain();
  reverbSend.gain.value = 0.0;
  reverbSend.connect(conv); conv.connect(wetGain); wetGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

  // Ride signal chain: rideIn → HPF → LPF → dry + reverb
  rideIn  = audioCtx.createGain();
  rideHPF = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  rideLPF = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  rideHPF.type = 'highpass'; rideHPF.frequency.value = 20;
  rideLPF.type = 'lowpass';  rideLPF.frequency.value = 20000;
  rideIn.connect(rideHPF); rideHPF.connect(rideLPF);
  rideLPF.connect(masterDry); rideLPF.connect(reverbSend);
}

// Extended inharmonic ratios — more partials push energy into the 1–4 kHz "ping" zone
const CYM_RATIOS  = [1, 1.483, 1.789, 2.255, 2.689, 3.136, 3.928, 4.733, 5.876, 7.402];
const BELL_RATIOS = [1, 2.0, 2.756, 4.07, 5.33, 6.8, 8.5];

const RIDE_PARAMS = {
  // 20" medium: balanced ping + moderate wash (workhorse ride)
  medium20: { base: 370, decay: 2.2,  noiseAmt: 0.22, vol: 0.50 },
  // 18" thin jazz: lower pitch, heavy wash, dark character
  jazz18:   { base: 310, decay: 4.2,  noiseAmt: 0.72, vol: 0.42 },
  // 22" heavy rock: bright, cutting, shorter sustain
  rock22:   { base: 440, decay: 1.4,  noiseAmt: 0.10, vol: 0.60 },
  // Flat ride: staccato, minimal wash — simulates no bow cup
  flat:     { base: 350, decay: 0.45, noiseAmt: 0.05, vol: 0.56 },
  // Bell: struck on the cup — bell-mode partials, pure sine tone
  bell:     { base: 480, decay: 1.8,  noiseAmt: 0.0,  vol: 0.65, ratios: BELL_RATIOS, oscType: 'sine' },
};

function synthCymbal(ctx, t, { base, decay, noiseAmt, vol, lpFreq, ratios, oscType }, out, technique = 'stick') {
  const isMallet = technique === 'mallet';
  const isBrush  = technique === 'brush';

  // Attack bloom for mallet (90ms) and brush (30ms); stick is instantaneous.
  const attackTime = isMallet ? 0.09 : isBrush ? 0.03 : 0;
  const totalDecay = attackTime + decay;

  const master = ctx.createGain();
  if (attackTime > 0) {
    master.gain.setValueAtTime(0.001, t);
    master.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(isBrush ? vol * 0.55 : vol, t + attackTime);
  } else {
    master.gain.setValueAtTime(vol, t);
  }
  master.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, t + totalDecay);

  if (lpFreq) {
    const lp = ctx.createBiquadFilter();
    lp.type = 'lowpass'; lp.frequency.value = lpFreq; lp.Q.value = 0.5;
    master.connect(lp); lp.connect(out);
  } else {
    master.connect(out);
  }

  // Mallet: steeper gain rolloff across partials emphasises the fundamental body.
  // Brush: tonal partials recede so the noise swish dominates.
  const partialMult = isBrush ? 0.30 : 1.0;
  const partialPow  = isMallet ? 1.8  : 1.0;
  (ratios || CYM_RATIOS).forEach((r, i) => {
    const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
    osc.type = oscType || 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = base * r;
    const g = ctx.createGain();
    g.gain.value = (0.28 / Math.pow(i + 1, partialPow)) * partialMult;
    osc.connect(g); g.connect(master);
    osc.start(t); osc.stop(t + totalDecay + 0.1);
  });

  // Brush amplifies noise and shifts filter to a swish bandpass (~2.5 kHz).
  // Mallet quiets and raises the highpass so less high-end shimmer survives.
  const effectiveNoise = isBrush
    ? Math.max(noiseAmt * 2.5, 0.50)
    : isMallet ? noiseAmt * 0.45 : noiseAmt;

  if (effectiveNoise > 0) {
    const ns = ctx.createBufferSource();
    ns.buffer = noiseBuffer; ns.loop = true;
    const ng = ctx.createGain(); ng.gain.value = effectiveNoise * 0.55;
    if (isBrush) {
      const bp = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); bp.type = 'bandpass'; bp.frequency.value = 2500; bp.Q.value = 1.2;
      ns.connect(bp); bp.connect(ng);
    } else if (isMallet) {
      const hp = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); hp.type = 'highpass'; hp.frequency.value = 5000;
      ns.connect(hp); hp.connect(ng);
    } else {
      const hp = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); hp.type = 'highpass'; hp.frequency.value = 3500;
      ns.connect(hp); hp.connect(ng);
    }
    ng.connect(master);
    ns.start(t); ns.stop(t + totalDecay + 0.1);
  }
}

function playDrumNote(instrument) {
  if (!instrument) return;
  if (instrument === 'ride') {
    initAudio();
    synthCymbal(audioCtx, audioCtx.currentTime,
      { ...RIDE_PARAMS[currentRideVariant], decay: rideDecay }, rideIn, rideTechnique);
    return;
  }
  const midi = DRUM_MIDI[instrument];
  if (!midi || !window.ABCJS) return;
  ABCJS.synth.playEvent(
    [{ pitch: midi, instrument: 128, duration: 0.125, volume: 80, cents: 0 }],
    null, 1000, SF
  ).catch(() => {});
}

// 1b) Pattern presets
const GROOVE_PATTERNS = {
  swing_ride:      { label:'Swing — ride cymbal',    meter:'4/4', groove:'rzrrrzrr' },
  swing_hats:      { label:'Swing — closed hi-hat',  meter:'4/4', groove:'hzhhzhzh' },
  swing_hats_open: { label:'Swing — open hi-hat',    meter:'4/4', groove:'hzhohoho' },
  swing_brushes:   { label:'Swing — brushes',        meter:'4/4', groove:'xzxhxhxh' },
  jazzwaltz_ride:  { label:'Jazz waltz — ride',      meter:'3/4', groove:'rzrrrz'   },
  jazzwaltz_hats:  { label:'Jazz waltz — hats',      meter:'3/4', groove:'hzhhhz'   },
  backbeat:        { label:'Backbeat',               meter:'4/4', groove:'khsh'     },
  driving8:        { label:'Driving 8ths',           meter:'4/4', groove:'khshkhsh' },
  ska:             { label:'Ska / reggae (one-drop)', meter:'4/4', groove:'zhzhkhzh' },
  bossa:           { label:'Bossa nova',             meter:'4/4', groove:'xrrxrrxr' },
  tango:           { label:'Tango (habanera)',        meter:'4/4', groove:'khhkhhkh' },
  montuno:         { label:'Son montuno (clave)',     meter:'4/4', groove:'khhskhkh' },
  samba:           { label:'Samba',                  meter:'4/4', groove:'zhkhshkh' },
  mambo:           { label:'Mambo',                  meter:'4/4', groove:'kzhhskhh' },
  calypso:         { label:'Calypso / mento',        meter:'4/4', groove:'zhkzkzsh' },
  funk:            { label:'Funk',                   meter:'4/4', groove:'kzhskhzs' },
  halftime:        { label:'Half-time feel',         meter:'4/4', groove:'khhhshhh' },
  secondline:      { label:'New Orleans second line',meter:'4/4', groove:'kskhkskh' },
  waltz:           { label:'Waltz',                  meter:'3/4', groove:'kzhzhz'   },
  compound6:       { label:'Compound (6/8)',          meter:'6/8', groove:'khhshh'   },
};
const TOKEN_TO_INST = {
  k: { row:'bottom', inst:'kick'      },
  s: { row:'middle', inst:'snare'     },
  h: { row:'top',    inst:'hihat'     },
  o: { row:'top',    inst:'hihatopen' },
  r: { row:'top',    inst:'ride'      },
  x: { row:'middle', inst:'rim'       },
  c: { row:'top',    inst:'crash'     },
};

const HAND_GROOVE_PATTERNS = {
  bongo_martillo:     { label:'Bongo — martillo',      meter:'4/4', groove:'HLHLHLHz' },
  bongo_slow:         { label:'Bongo — quarters',      meter:'4/4', groove:'HzHzHzHz' },
  conga_tumbao:       { label:'Conga — tumbao',        meter:'4/4', groove:'CzCzmzOz' },
  conga_tumbao_dense: { label:'Conga — tumbao (dense)',meter:'4/4', groove:'CzCzmzOz' },
  conga_son:          { label:'Conga — son',           meter:'4/4', groove:'CzmzOzmz' },
  conga_waltz:        { label:'Conga — waltz',         meter:'3/4', groove:'CzOzOz'   },
  conga_6_8:          { label:'Conga — 6/8',           meter:'6/8', groove:'COzCOz'   },
};
const TOKEN_TO_HAND_INST = {
  H: 'hibongo', L: 'lobongo',
  C: 'congaopen', O: 'congaslap', m: 'congamuted',
  e: 'congamuted', u: 'congamuted', P: 'congaopen',
};

// Categorise a meter string ('4/4', '3/4', '6/8') into a family
function meterTypeOf(meterStr) {
  if (!meterStr) return 'duple';
  const [n, d] = meterStr.split('/').map(Number);
  if (d === 8) return 'compound';
  if (n % 3 === 0) return 'triple';
  return 'duple';
}

// Apply the meterFilter select to pattern option labels
function applyMeterFilter() {
  const want = meterFilterSelect ? meterFilterSelect.value : '';
  [loadPatternSelect, loadHandPatternSelect].forEach(sel => {
    if (!sel) return;
    sel.querySelectorAll('option[data-mt]').forEach(opt => {
      const matches = !want || opt.dataset.mt === want;
      const base = opt.dataset.ol || opt.textContent.replace(/^◦\s*/, '');
      opt.textContent = matches ? base : '◦ ' + base;
      opt.style.color  = matches ? '' : '#999';
    });
  });
}

// 1c) Instrument icons — standard drum notation symbols
// Cymbals use × noteheads; drums use filled noteheads; rim uses + crosshair.
// All SVGs share a 14×14 viewBox so they scale inside any step cell.
const INST_COLOR = {
  hihat:    '#a8c8f0', hihatopen:'#c8dff8', crash:   '#b8a0e0',
  snare:    '#f0a0a0', hitom:    '#f5c470', lowtom:  '#f0a850',
  floortom: '#e09050', rim:      '#e0a0c8', rimshot: '#d068a8',
  flam:     '#f4b8a0', kick:     '#88d898', hatfoot: '#70c8c0',
  // Hand percussion: warm earth tones
  hibongo:    '#e8c88a', lobongo:   '#d4a860',
  congaopen:  '#c8e890', congaslap: '#a8d060', congamuted: '#d0e8b0',
};
const INST_SVG = {
  // × noteheads for cymbals
  hihat:    `<line x1="3" y1="3" x2="11" y2="11"/><line x1="11" y1="3" x2="3" y2="11"/>`,
  hihatopen:`<line x1="3" y1="3" x2="11" y2="11"/><line x1="11" y1="3" x2="3" y2="11"/><path d="M1 12.5 Q7 11 13 12.5" fill="none"/>`,
  crash:    `<path d="M7 2 L12.5 10 L7 8.5 L1.5 10 Z" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  // Filled noteheads for drums
  snare:    `<ellipse cx="7" cy="7" rx="5.5" ry="4" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  hitom:    `<ellipse cx="7" cy="7" rx="3.5" ry="2.8" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  lowtom:   `<ellipse cx="7" cy="7" rx="4.5" ry="3.5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  floortom: `<ellipse cx="7" cy="7" rx="5.5" ry="4" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  // + crosshair for side-stick/rim
  rim:      `<line x1="7" y1="2" x2="7" y2="12"/><line x1="2" y1="7" x2="12" y2="7"/>`,
  rimshot:  `<ellipse cx="7" cy="7" rx="4.5" ry="3.5" fill="currentColor"/><line x1="7" y1="3" x2="7" y2="11" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="3" y1="7" x2="11" y2="7" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>`,
  flam:     `<ellipse cx="9" cy="7.5" rx="4" ry="3" fill="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="3.5" cy="9" rx="2" ry="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  kick:     `<circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5.5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  hatfoot:  `<line x1="3" y1="3" x2="11" y2="9"/><line x1="11" y1="3" x2="3" y2="9"/><line x1="2" y1="11" x2="12" y2="11"/>`,
  // Hand percussion
  // Hi bongo: small filled circle (high pitch = smaller shape)
  hibongo:    `<circle cx="7" cy="7" r="3.5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  // Lo bongo: larger filled circle
  lobongo:    `<circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  // Conga open tone: open circle (○ notehead — standard for open strokes)
  congaopen:  `<circle cx="7" cy="7" r="4.5"/>`,
  // Conga slap: filled circle with accent wedge above (standard slap notation)
  congaslap:  `<circle cx="7" cy="8" r="4" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M4.5 2.5 L7 1 L9.5 2.5" fill="none" stroke-width="1.8"/>`,
  // Conga muted: × notehead (standard dead/muted stroke notation)
  congamuted: `<line x1="3" y1="3" x2="11" y2="11"/><line x1="11" y1="3" x2="3" y2="11"/>`,
};
// Row header icons: cymbal on stand, snare cylinder, kick circle, bongo pair
const ROW_SVG = {
  top:    `<ellipse cx="12" cy="14" rx="10" ry="3"/><line x1="12" y1="11" x2="12" y2="4"/>`,
  middle: `<ellipse cx="12" cy="7" rx="9" ry="3"/><line x1="3" y1="7" x2="3" y2="17"/><line x1="21" y1="7" x2="21" y2="17"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="17" rx="9" ry="3"/>`,
  bottom: `<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.5" fill="currentColor"/>`,
  // Bongo pair: two circles of different sizes side by side
  hand:   `<circle cx="7" cy="13" r="5"/><circle cx="17" cy="13" r="7"/><line x1="7" y1="8" x2="7" y2="4"/><line x1="17" y1="6" x2="17" y2="4"/>`,
};

// 2) Instrument/menu state
const instrumentOptions = {
  top:    ['hihat','hihatopen','ride','crash'],
  middle: ['snare','hitom','lowtom','floortom','rim','rimshot','flam'],
  bottom: ['kick','hatfoot'],
  hand:   ['hibongo','lobongo','congaopen','congaslap','congamuted'],
};
const allInstruments = ['hihat','hihatopen','crash','ride','hatfoot','snare','rim','rimshot','flam','hitom','lowtom','floortom','kick','hibongo','lobongo','congaopen','congaslap','congamuted'];
let activeInstruments = {
  top:    [...instrumentOptions.top],
  middle: [...instrumentOptions.middle],
  bottom: [...instrumentOptions.bottom],
  hand:   [...instrumentOptions.hand],
};

// 3) Sequencer state
let sequence = { top: [], middle: [], bottom: [], hand: [] };
let totalStepsGlobal = 16;
let currentStep = 0;
let isPlaying = false;
let intervalId = null;  // timeout handle for the playback loop
let customLabels = [];
// Swing intent is read from swingRange.value (0–25) and combined with tempo
// to produce the actual per-step ratio. No separate global needed.


// 4) UI refs
const sequencerContainer   = document.querySelector('.sequencer-container');
const playBtn              = document.getElementById('playBtn');
const stopBtn              = document.getElementById('stopBtn');
const tempoInput           = document.getElementById('tempo');
const metronomeToggle      = document.getElementById('metronomeToggle');
const metronomePulseToggle = document.getElementById('metronomePulseToggle');
const numeratorInput       = document.getElementById('numerator');
const bottomNoteSelect     = document.getElementById('bottomNote');
const sizeRange            = document.getElementById('sizeRange');
const sizeValue            = document.getElementById('sizeValue');
const customizeLabelsBtn   = document.getElementById('customizeLabelsBtn');
const labelStyleSelect     = document.getElementById('labelStyle');
const symbolToggle         = document.getElementById('symbolToggle');
const labelSizeRange       = document.getElementById('labelSizeRange');
const labelSizeValue       = document.getElementById('labelSizeValue');
const titleSizeRange       = document.getElementById('titleSizeRange');
const gridTitleInput       = document.getElementById('gridTitleInput');
const gridTitleDisplay     = document.getElementById('gridTitleDisplay');
const tempoQuarter         = document.getElementById('tempo-quarter');
const tempoEighth          = document.getElementById('tempo-eighth');
const tempoDotted          = document.getElementById('tempo-dotted');
const tempoDial            = document.getElementById('tempoDial');
const exportBtn            = document.getElementById('exportBtn');
const exportArea           = document.getElementById('exportArea');
const scrollWrapper        = exportArea.querySelector('.overflow-auto');
const scaleStage           = exportArea.querySelector('.sequencer-scale-stage');
const dialQuarter          = document.getElementById('dial-option-quarter');
const dialEighth           = document.getElementById('dial-option-eighth');
const dialSixteenth        = document.getElementById('dial-option-sixteenth');
const loadPatternSelect     = document.getElementById('loadPatternSelect');
const loadHandPatternSelect = document.getElementById('loadHandPatternSelect');
const meterFilterSelect     = document.getElementById('meterFilter');
const swingRange            = document.getElementById('swingRange');
const swingValueLabel       = document.getElementById('swingValue');
const rideSelect            = document.getElementById('rideSelect');
const techniqueSelect       = document.getElementById('techniqueSelect');
let rideTechnique = 'stick';
const rideDecayRange        = document.getElementById('rideDecayRange');
const rideDecayValueLabel   = document.getElementById('rideDecayValue');
const reverbRange           = document.getElementById('reverbRange');
const reverbValueLabel      = document.getElementById('reverbValue');
const rideHpRange           = document.getElementById('rideHpRange');
const rideHpValueLabel      = document.getElementById('rideHpValue');
const rideLpRange           = document.getElementById('rideLpRange');
const rideLpValueLabel      = document.getElementById('rideLpValue');
let rideDecay = RIDE_PARAMS.medium20.decay;

let currentDialValue   = 2;
let currentLabelStyle  = labelStyleSelect.value || 'Standard';
let currentSymbol      = symbolToggle.checked ? '&' : '+';
let metronomePulse     = metronomePulseToggle.checked ? 'eighth' : 'quarter';
let currentTempoFactor = 1;
let customLabelMode    = false;
const MIN_SCALE        = parseFloat(sizeRange.min) || 0.5;
const MAX_SCALE        = parseFloat(sizeRange.max) || 6;
const FIT_BUFFER_PX    = 2;
let currentScale       = parseFloat(sizeRange.value) || 1;
let scaleTouched       = false;
let baseGridWidth      = 0;
let baseGridHeight     = 0;

// 5) Step-cell visuals & rotation
function updateStepVisual(el, instr) {
  el.innerHTML = '';
  el.classList.toggle('active', Boolean(instr));
  if (instr) {
    el.style.background = INST_COLOR[instr] || '#e0e8ff';
    el.title = instr;
    const paths = INST_SVG[instr];
    if (paths) {
      const sw = instr === 'rim' || instr === 'hatfoot' ? '2' : '1.5';
      el.innerHTML = `<div class="step-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" width="65%" height="65%" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"
             stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">${paths}</svg>
      </div>`;
    }
  } else {
    el.style.background = '';
    el.title = '';
  }
}

function handleStepClick(el, row, idx) {
  prewarmSoundfont();
  const opts = activeInstruments[row];
  const cur  = sequence[row][idx];
  const i    = opts.indexOf(cur);
  let next   = i < 0 ? opts[0] : (i === opts.length-1 ? '' : opts[i+1]);
  sequence[row][idx] = next;
  updateStepVisual(el, next);
  playDrumNote(next);
}

// 6) Label/subdivision logic
function getLabel(beat, subIndex, dialVal, labelStyle, bottom, numerator) {
  if (bottom === '4') {
    if (subIndex === 0) return `${beat}`;
    if (labelStyle === 'Gordon') {
      if (dialVal===2 && subIndex===1) return 'de';
      if (dialVal===4) {
        if (subIndex===1) return 'ta';
        if (subIndex===2) return 'de';
        if (subIndex===3) return 'ta';
      }
    }
    if (labelStyle === 'Eastman') {
      if (dialVal===2 && subIndex===1) return 'te';
      if (dialVal===4) {
        if (subIndex===1) return 'ti';
        if (subIndex===2) return 'te';
        if (subIndex===3) return 'ta';
      }
    }
    if (dialVal===2 && subIndex===1) return currentSymbol;
    if (dialVal===4) {
      if (subIndex===1) return 'e';
      if (subIndex===2) return currentSymbol;
      if (subIndex===3) return 'a';
    }
    return currentSymbol;
  }
  if (bottom === '8') {
    const isCompound = numerator % 3 === 0;
    if (dialVal===2 && isCompound) {
      if (subIndex===0) return `${beat}`;
      if (labelStyle === 'Gordon') return subIndex===1?'da':'di';
      return subIndex===1?'la':'li';
    }
    if (dialVal===4 && isCompound) {
      if (subIndex===0) return `${beat}`;
      if (labelStyle === 'Gordon') {
        const gmap = ['','ta','da','ta','di','ta'];
        return gmap[subIndex] || currentSymbol;
      }
      const map=['','ta','la','ta','li','ta'];
      return map[subIndex]||currentSymbol;
    }
    return '+';
  }
  return currentSymbol;
}

function updateDefaultLabels() {
  const cells = document.querySelectorAll('.step-labels .label');
  const bottom = bottomNoteSelect.value;
  const numerator = parseInt(numeratorInput.value, 10);
  cells.forEach(cell => {
    const idx = parseInt(cell.dataset.index, 10);
    if (customLabels[idx] != null) return;
    if (bottom === '4') {
      const beat = Math.floor(idx/currentDialValue)+1;
      const sub  = idx % currentDialValue;
      cell.innerHTML = sub===0
        ? `${beat}`
        : getLabel(beat, sub, currentDialValue, currentLabelStyle, bottom, numerator);
    } else {
      const isCompound = numerator % 3 === 0;
      if (!isCompound) {
        cell.innerHTML = '+';
      } else {
        const grp = currentDialValue===2?3:6;
        const beatNum = Math.floor(idx/grp)+1;
        const sub = idx % grp;
        cell.innerHTML = sub===0
          ? `${beatNum}`
          : getLabel(beatNum, sub, currentDialValue, currentLabelStyle, bottom, numerator);
      }
    }
  });
}

function updateSubdivisionDials() {
  if (bottomNoteSelect.value === '8') {
    dialQuarter.classList.add('disabled');
    if (currentDialValue===1) {
      dialQuarter.classList.remove('selected');
      dialEighth.classList.add('selected');
      currentDialValue = 2;
    }
  } else {
    dialQuarter.classList.remove('disabled');
  }
}

// 7) Build grid
function generateSequencer() {
  updateSubdivisionDials();
  const numerator = parseInt(numeratorInput.value, 10);
  const bottom    = bottomNoteSelect.value;
  let total = 0;
  if (bottom==='4') total = numerator * currentDialValue;
  else              total = (currentDialValue===2 ? numerator : numerator*2);

  totalStepsGlobal = total;
  customLabels = Array(total).fill(null);

  sequencerContainer.innerHTML = '';
  ['top','middle','bottom','hand'].forEach(row => {
    sequence[row] = Array(total).fill('');
    const r = document.createElement('div');
    r.classList.add('row','instrument-row');
    r.dataset.row = row;
    // Row icon: cymbal / snare / kick visual
    const icon = document.createElement('div');
    icon.className = 'row-icon';
    icon.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="28" height="28" fill="none"
        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"
        stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">${ROW_SVG[row]}</svg>`;
    r.appendChild(icon);
    for (let i=0; i<total; i++) {
      const s = document.createElement('div');
      s.classList.add('step');
      s.addEventListener('click', () => handleStepClick(s, row, i));
      r.appendChild(s);
    }
    sequencerContainer.appendChild(r);
  });

  const labelRow = document.createElement('div');
  labelRow.classList.add('row','step-labels');
  // Spacer to align beat labels under the steps (not the row icon)
  const spacer = document.createElement('div');
  spacer.className = 'step-label-spacer';
  labelRow.appendChild(spacer);

  if (bottom==='4') {
    for (let b=1; b<=numerator; b++) {
      for (let s=0; s<currentDialValue; s++) {
        const idx = (b-1)*currentDialValue + s;
        const cell = document.createElement('div');
        cell.classList.add('label');
        cell.dataset.index = idx;
        cell.innerHTML = s===0
          ? `${b}`
          : getLabel(b, s, currentDialValue, currentLabelStyle, bottom, numerator);
        cell.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (!customLabelMode) return;
          const txt = prompt('New label:', cell.textContent);
          if (txt != null) { customLabels[idx] = txt; cell.textContent = txt; }
        });
        labelRow.appendChild(cell);
      }
    }
  } else {
    const isCompound = numerator % 3 === 0;
    const grp = currentDialValue===2?3:6;
    if (!isCompound) {
      for (let i=0; i<total; i++) {
        const cell = document.createElement('div');
        cell.classList.add('label');
        cell.dataset.index = i;
        cell.innerHTML = '+';
        cell.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (!customLabelMode) return;
          const txt = prompt('New label:', cell.textContent);
          if (txt != null) { customLabels[i] = txt; cell.textContent = txt; }
        });
        labelRow.appendChild(cell);
      }
    } else {
      for (let i=0; i<total; i++) {
        const cell = document.createElement('div');
        cell.classList.add('label');
        cell.dataset.index = i;
        const beatNum = Math.floor(i/grp)+1;
        const sub = i % grp;
        cell.innerHTML = sub===0
          ? `${beatNum}`
          : getLabel(beatNum, sub, currentDialValue, currentLabelStyle, bottom, numerator);
        cell.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (!customLabelMode) return;
          const txt = prompt('New label:', cell.textContent);
          if (txt != null) { customLabels[i] = txt; cell.textContent = txt; }
        });
        labelRow.appendChild(cell);
      }
    }
  }

  sequencerContainer.appendChild(labelRow);
  updateDefaultLabels();
}

// 8) Playback
function highlightCurrentStep(i) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.step-labels .label')
    .forEach(c => c.classList.toggle('current-step', c.dataset.index == i));
}

function playStep(i) {
  ['top','middle','bottom','hand'].forEach(r => {
    playDrumNote(sequence[r][i]);
  });
  if (!metronomeToggle.checked) return;
  const bottom = bottomNoteSelect.value;
  const num = parseInt(numeratorInput.value, 10);
  if (bottom==='4') {
    const half = currentDialValue/2;
    if (i%currentDialValue===0 ||
        (metronomePulse==='eighth' && i%currentDialValue===half)) {
      playDrumNote('metronome');
    }
  } else {
    const isComp = num % 3 === 0;
    if (!isComp) playDrumNote('metronome');
    else {
      const grp = currentDialValue===2?3:6;
      if (metronomePulse==='quarter') {
        if (i%grp===0) playDrumNote('metronome');
      } else {
        playDrumNote('metronome');
      }
    }
  }
}

// At a given BPM, map the slider's intent (0.50–0.75) to the actual swing ratio.
// Follows the Friberg & Sundström curve: full intent at 80 BPM, straight at 300 BPM.
function computeSwingRatio(bpm) {
  const intent = 0.5 + parseInt(swingRange.value, 10) / 100;
  if (intent <= 0.5) return 0.5;
  const t = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (bpm - 80) / 220));
  return intent * (1 - t) + 0.5 * t;
}

// Update the label next to the swing slider with the current effective ratio.
function updateSwingDisplay() {
  const sliderVal = parseInt(swingRange.value, 10);
  if (sliderVal === 0) { swingValueLabel.textContent = 'off'; return; }
  const bpm = parseInt(tempoInput.value, 10) || 120;
  const ratio = computeSwingRatio(bpm);
  const name = sliderVal <= 8 ? 'light' : sliderVal <= 17 ? 'swing' : 'hard';
  swingValueLabel.textContent = `${name} · ${Math.round(ratio * 100)}%`;
}

// Returns ms to wait after playing stepIndex before advancing to the next step.
// Swing shifts odd (upbeat) steps later within each beat pair, only in simple
// duple meter with 8th-note subdivision.
function getStepDelay(stepIndex) {
  const bpm = parseInt(tempoInput.value, 10) || 120;
  const base = 60 / (bpm * currentTempoFactor);
  const bottom = bottomNoteSelect.value;
  const num = parseInt(numeratorInput.value, 10);
  let subdiv;
  if (bottom === '4') subdiv = currentDialValue;
  else {
    const isComp = num % 3 === 0;
    subdiv = isComp ? (currentDialValue === 2 ? 3 : 6) : currentDialValue;
  }
  const baseMs = (base / subdiv) * 1000;

  // Swing: alternate beat durations so that downbeats are longer than upbeats.
  // Only applies to simple meter (bottom=4) with eighth-note subdivision (dialValue=2).
  const sw = computeSwingRatio(bpm);
  if (sw > 0.5 && bottom === '4' && currentDialValue === 2) {
    const beatMs = baseMs * 2;           // one full beat = two eighth-note steps
    return (stepIndex % 2 === 0)
      ? beatMs * sw                      // downbeat: longer
      : beatMs * (1 - sw);              // upbeat: shorter
  }
  return baseMs;
}

function scheduleNextTick() {
  if (!isPlaying) return;
  const delay = getStepDelay(currentStep);
  intervalId = setTimeout(() => {
    currentStep = (currentStep + 1) % totalStepsGlobal;
    highlightCurrentStep(currentStep);
    playStep(currentStep);
    scheduleNextTick();
  }, delay);
}

function startPlaying() {
  if (isPlaying) return;
  isPlaying = true;
  currentStep = 0;
  highlightCurrentStep(0);
  playStep(0);
  scheduleNextTick();
}

function stopPlaying() {
  isPlaying = false;
  clearTimeout(intervalId);
  document.querySelectorAll('.step-labels .label').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('current-step'));
}

function updatePlaybackInterval() {
  if (!isPlaying) return;
  clearTimeout(intervalId);
  scheduleNextTick();
}

// 9) UI bindings
function selectTempoOption(el) {
  tempoDial.querySelectorAll('.dial-option').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  currentTempoFactor = parseFloat(el.dataset.value);
  updatePlaybackInterval();
}

tempoQuarter.addEventListener('click', () => selectTempoOption(tempoQuarter));
tempoEighth.addEventListener('click',  () => selectTempoOption(tempoEighth));
tempoDotted.addEventListener('click',  () => selectTempoOption(tempoDotted));

metronomePulseToggle.addEventListener('change', () => {
  if (metronomePulseToggle.checked) {
    metronomeToggle.checked = true;
    metronomeToggle.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
  }
  metronomePulse = metronomePulseToggle.checked ? 'eighth' : 'quarter';
});

function clampScale(value) {
  return Math.min(MAX_SCALE, Math.max(MIN_SCALE, value));
}

function updateScaleReadout(value) {
  sizeValue.textContent = Number(value.toFixed(2)).toString();
}

function captureBaseGridSize() {
  const priorTransform   = sequencerContainer.style.transform;
  const priorGridWidth   = sequencerContainer.style.width;
  const priorGridHeight  = sequencerContainer.style.height;
  const priorStageWidth  = scaleStage.style.width;
  const priorStageHeight = scaleStage.style.height;

  sequencerContainer.style.transform = 'none';
  sequencerContainer.style.width = 'auto';
  sequencerContainer.style.height = 'auto';
  scaleStage.style.width = 'auto';
  scaleStage.style.height = 'auto';

  baseGridWidth  = sequencerContainer.scrollWidth;
  baseGridHeight = sequencerContainer.scrollHeight;

  sequencerContainer.style.transform = priorTransform;
  sequencerContainer.style.width  = priorGridWidth;
  sequencerContainer.style.height = priorGridHeight;
  scaleStage.style.width  = priorStageWidth;
  scaleStage.style.height = priorStageHeight;
}

function syncScaleStageSize(scaleVal) {
  if (!baseGridWidth || !baseGridHeight) captureBaseGridSize();
  if (!baseGridWidth || !baseGridHeight) return;
  sequencerContainer.style.width  = `${Math.ceil(baseGridWidth)}px`;
  sequencerContainer.style.height = `${Math.ceil(baseGridHeight)}px`;
  scaleStage.style.width  = `${Math.ceil(baseGridWidth * scaleVal)}px`;
  scaleStage.style.height = `${Math.ceil(baseGridHeight * scaleVal)}px`;
}

function syncHorizontalOverflow() {
  if (!scrollWrapper || !scaleStage) return;
  const needsScroll = scaleStage.scrollWidth > scrollWrapper.clientWidth;
  scrollWrapper.style.overflowX = needsScroll ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
}

function applyGridScale(rawScale, { updateSlider = true } = {}) {
  const normalized = clampScale(rawScale);
  currentScale = normalized;
  sequencerContainer.style.transform = `scale(${normalized})`;
  syncScaleStageSize(normalized);
  syncHorizontalOverflow();
  if (updateSlider) sizeRange.value = normalized.toString();
  updateScaleReadout(normalized);
}

function fitGridToViewport() {
  if (!baseGridWidth) captureBaseGridSize();
  const naturalWidth  = baseGridWidth;
  const visibleWidth  = scrollWrapper.clientWidth;
  if (!naturalWidth || !visibleWidth) { applyGridScale(currentScale); return; }
  const fitScale = clampScale((visibleWidth - FIT_BUFFER_PX) / naturalWidth);
  applyGridScale(fitScale);
}

function refreshScaleAfterLayoutChange() {
  if (scaleTouched) applyGridScale(currentScale);
  else fitGridToViewport();
}

function regenerateSequencer() {
  generateSequencer();
  updateTempoDialDefaults();
  captureBaseGridSize();
  refreshScaleAfterLayoutChange();
}

function loadPattern(id) {
  const p = GROOVE_PATTERNS[id];
  if (!p) return;
  const [num, denom] = p.meter.split('/');
  numeratorInput.value = num;
  bottomNoteSelect.value = denom;
  [dialQuarter, dialEighth, dialSixteenth].forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
  dialEighth.classList.add('selected');
  currentDialValue = 2;
  regenerateSequencer();
  const steps = totalStepsGlobal;
  let g = p.groove;
  while (g.length < steps) g += p.groove;
  g = g.slice(0, steps);
  for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
    const m = TOKEN_TO_INST[g[i]];
    if (m) sequence[m.row][i] = m.inst;
  }
  ['top','middle','bottom','hand'].forEach(row => {
    sequencerContainer
      .querySelector(`.instrument-row[data-row="${row}"]`)
      ?.querySelectorAll('.step')
      .forEach((el, i) => updateStepVisual(el, sequence[row][i]));
  });
  gridTitleInput.value = p.label;
  gridTitleDisplay.textContent = p.label;
  // Swing and jazz waltz patterns call for swing feel — set slider to max
  if (/^(swing|jazzwaltz)/.test(id)) {
    swingRange.value = 25;
    updateSwingDisplay();
    updatePlaybackInterval();
  }
}

function loadHandPattern(id) {
  const p = HAND_GROOVE_PATTERNS[id];
  if (!p) return;
  // Sync meter if pattern requires a different one (mirrors loadPattern behaviour)
  const [num, denom] = p.meter.split('/');
  if (numeratorInput.value !== num || bottomNoteSelect.value !== denom) {
    numeratorInput.value = num;
    bottomNoteSelect.value = denom;
    [dialQuarter, dialEighth, dialSixteenth].forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
    dialEighth.classList.add('selected');
    currentDialValue = 2;
    regenerateSequencer();
  }
  // Clear only the hand row; preserve drum rows
  const steps = totalStepsGlobal;
  sequence.hand = Array(steps).fill('');
  let g = p.groove;
  while (g.length < steps) g += p.groove;
  g = g.slice(0, steps);
  for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
    const inst = TOKEN_TO_HAND_INST[g[i]];
    if (inst) sequence.hand[i] = inst;
  }
  sequencerContainer
    .querySelector('.instrument-row[data-row="hand"]')
    ?.querySelectorAll('.step')
    .forEach((el, i) => updateStepVisual(el, sequence.hand[i]));
}

function updateTempoDialDefaults() {
  const bottom = bottomNoteSelect.value;
  const num = parseInt(numeratorInput.value, 10);
  if (bottom==='4') selectTempoOption(tempoQuarter);
  else {
    const isComp = num % 3 === 0;
    selectTempoOption(isComp ? tempoDotted : tempoEighth);
  }
}

symbolToggle.addEventListener('change', () => {
  currentSymbol = symbolToggle.checked ? '&' : '+';
  updateDefaultLabels();
});

customizeLabelsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  customLabelMode = !customLabelMode;
  customizeLabelsBtn.textContent = customLabelMode ? 'Done Customizing' : 'Customize Labels';
  customizeLabelsBtn.classList.toggle('btn-warning', customLabelMode);
});

sizeRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  scaleTouched = true;
  applyGridScale(parseFloat(sizeRange.value), { updateSlider: false });
});

labelSizeRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  labelSizeValue.textContent = labelSizeRange.value;
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--label-font-size', `${labelSizeRange.value}rem`);
});

titleSizeRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--title-font-size', `${titleSizeRange.value}rem`);
});

gridTitleInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
  gridTitleDisplay.textContent = gridTitleInput.value;
});

dialQuarter.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (bottomNoteSelect.value === '8') return;
  dialQuarter.classList.add('selected');
  dialEighth.classList.remove('selected');
  dialSixteenth.classList.remove('selected');
  currentDialValue = 1;
  regenerateSequencer();
});

dialEighth.addEventListener('click', () => {
  dialQuarter.classList.remove('selected');
  dialEighth.classList.add('selected');
  dialSixteenth.classList.remove('selected');
  currentDialValue = 2;
  regenerateSequencer();
});

dialSixteenth.addEventListener('click', () => {
  dialQuarter.classList.remove('selected');
  dialEighth.classList.remove('selected');
  dialSixteenth.classList.add('selected');
  currentDialValue = 4;
  regenerateSequencer();
});

numeratorInput.addEventListener('change', regenerateSequencer);
bottomNoteSelect.addEventListener('change', regenerateSequencer);
tempoInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
  updateSwingDisplay();
  updatePlaybackInterval();
});

swingRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  updateSwingDisplay();
  updatePlaybackInterval();
});

rideSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
  currentRideVariant = rideSelect.value;
  rideDecay = RIDE_PARAMS[currentRideVariant].decay;
  rideDecayRange.value = rideDecay.toFixed(1);
  rideDecayValueLabel.textContent = rideDecay.toFixed(1);
});
techniqueSelect.addEventListener('change', () => { rideTechnique = techniqueSelect.value; });

rideDecayRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  rideDecay = parseFloat(rideDecayRange.value);
  rideDecayValueLabel.textContent = rideDecay.toFixed(1);
});

reverbRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  reverbValueLabel.textContent = reverbRange.value;
  if (reverbSend) reverbSend.gain.value = parseInt(reverbRange.value, 10) / 100;
});

function fmtHz(hz) { return hz >= 1000 ? (hz / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'k' : String(hz); }

rideHpRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  rideHpValueLabel.textContent = fmtHz(parseInt(rideHpRange.value, 10));
  if (rideHPF) rideHPF.frequency.value = parseInt(rideHpRange.value, 10);
});
rideLpRange.addEventListener('input', () => {
  rideLpValueLabel.textContent = fmtHz(parseInt(rideLpRange.value, 10));
  if (rideLPF) rideLPF.frequency.value = parseInt(rideLpRange.value, 10);
});

playBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (isPlaying) return;
  prewarmSoundfont();
  startPlaying();
});
stopBtn.addEventListener('click', stopPlaying);

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.code !== 'Space') return;
  const tag = document.activeElement?.tagName;
  if (tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA') return;
  e.preventDefault();
  if (isPlaying) stopPlaying(); else startPlaying();
});
loadPatternSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
  if (loadPatternSelect.value) loadPattern(loadPatternSelect.value);
});
loadHandPatternSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
  if (loadHandPatternSelect.value) loadHandPattern(loadHandPatternSelect.value);
});
meterFilterSelect.addEventListener('change', applyMeterFilter);

labelStyleSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
  currentLabelStyle = labelStyleSelect.value;
  try { localStorage.setItem('countingStyle', currentLabelStyle); } catch(e) {}
  updateDefaultLabels();
});

exportBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const stage = exportArea.querySelector('.sequencer-scale-stage');
  if (!stage) return;

  const captureRoot = document.createElement('div');
  captureRoot.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:-10000px;top:0;display:inline-block;padding:0;margin:0;overflow:visible;background:transparent;';

  const titleText = (gridTitleDisplay.textContent || '').trim();
  if (titleText) {
    const titleClone = gridTitleDisplay.cloneNode(true);
    captureRoot.appendChild(titleClone);
  }

  const stageClone = stage.cloneNode(true);
  stageClone.style.display = 'inline-block';
  stageClone.style.overflow = 'visible';
  captureRoot.appendChild(stageClone);
  document.body.appendChild(captureRoot);

  stageClone.querySelectorAll('.row').forEach(row => {
    row.style.cssText += 'margin:0;flex-wrap:nowrap;--bs-gutter-x:0;--bs-gutter-y:0;';
  });
  stageClone.querySelectorAll('.row > .label, .row > .step').forEach(cell => {
    cell.style.cssText += 'width:auto;max-width:none;flex-shrink:1;margin-top:0;padding-left:0;padding-right:0;';
  });
  stageClone.querySelectorAll('.step-icon svg').forEach(svg => {
    svg.style.cssText += 'display:block;';
  });

  const res = parseFloat(document.getElementById('exportResolution').value) || 2;
  const width  = Math.ceil(captureRoot.scrollWidth);
  const height = Math.ceil(captureRoot.scrollHeight);

  html2canvas(captureRoot, { scale: res, useCORS: true, width, height })
    .then(canvas => {
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      a.download = 'drum-sequence.png';
      a.click();
    })
    .catch(err => console.error('Export failed', err))
    .finally(() => captureRoot.remove());
});

const INST_LABEL = {
  hihat:'Hi-hat',   hihatopen:'Open HH', crash:'Crash',
  snare:'Snare',    hitom:'Hi Tom',      lowtom:'Lo Tom',
  floortom:'Fl. Tom', rim:'Rim',         rimshot:'Rimshot',
  flam:'Flam',      kick:'Kick',         hatfoot:'HH Foot',
  hibongo:'Hi Bongo', lobongo:'Lo Bongo',
  congaopen:'Conga Open', congaslap:'Conga Slap', congamuted:'Conga Muted',
};

function renderInstrumentMenu() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.instrument-group').forEach(group => {
    const row  = group.dataset.row;
    const cont = group.querySelector('.instrument-options');
    cont.innerHTML = '';
    // Show only instruments relevant to this row
    const rowInstrs = instrumentOptions[row] || allInstruments;
    rowInstrs.forEach(instr => {
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'instrument-chip' + (activeInstruments[row].includes(instr) ? ' active' : '');
      chip.title = INST_LABEL[instr] || instr;
      const sw = (instr === 'rim' || instr === 'hatfoot') ? '2' : '1.5';
      chip.innerHTML = `
        <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" width="28" height="28"
             fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="${sw}"
             stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
             style="background:${INST_COLOR[instr]||'#eee'};border-radius:4px;padding:2px;"
             aria-hidden="true">${INST_SVG[instr] || ''}</svg>
        <span>${INST_LABEL[instr] || instr}</span>`;
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const idx = activeInstruments[row].indexOf(instr);
        if (idx === -1) activeInstruments[row].push(instr);
        else {
          activeInstruments[row].splice(idx, 1);
          sequence[row] = sequence[row].map(i => i===instr?'':i);
          document.querySelectorAll(`.instrument-row[data-row="${row}"] .step`)
            .forEach((el, i) => updateStepVisual(el, sequence[row][i]));
        }
        renderInstrumentMenu();
      });
      cont.appendChild(chip);
    });
  });
}

window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // Sync counting style from localStorage (set by tune page)
  try {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('countingStyle');
    if (saved && labelStyleSelect.querySelector(`option[value="${saved}"]`)) {
      labelStyleSelect.value = saved;
      currentLabelStyle = saved;
    }
  } catch(e) {}

  // Sync meter filter from tuneMeter stored by tune-assessment page
  try {
    const tm = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('tuneMeter') || 'null');
    if (tm) {
      const fam = meterTypeOf(tm.n + '/' + tm.d);
      meterFilterSelect.value = fam;
    }
  } catch(e) {}

  selectTempoOption(tempoQuarter);
  dialEighth.classList.add('selected');
  currentDialValue = 2;
  generateSequencer();
  renderInstrumentMenu();
  applyMeterFilter();
  updateSwingDisplay();
  refreshScaleAfterLayoutChange();
});

window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  refreshScaleAfterLayoutChange();
});
  </script>
</div>
```
